      Constant Field
      Value
      public static final String
      MSG_ExceptionNotThrown
      "Expected Exception \'%s\' was not thrown"
      public static final String
      MSG_ExceptionThrown
      "Unexpected Exception \'%s\' was thrown"
      public static final String
      MSG_WrongExceptionThrown
      "Wrong Exception type; caught \'%2$s\' but \'%1$s\' was expected"
